# Contributing to winlator-zmod

[English](#english) | [简体中文](#chinese)

<a name="english"></a>
## English version

---

## Project Background & Attribution

**Winlator-Zmod** is a modified version (fork) based on the work of [moze30](https://github.com/moze30/winlator-zmod), who organized the original [Winlator](https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator) project.

*   **Original Author:** [brunodev85 (Bruno)](https://github.com/brunodev85)
*   **Intermediate Contributor/Organizer:** [moze30](https://github.com/moze30/winlator-zmod)
*   **Maintainer of this Fork:** This repository is maintained as a further modified version. I am accurately stating that I am **NOT** the original author of Winlator; I focus on forking, modifying, and maintaining this specific version based on the organized work of moze30.

### Acknowledgments & Third-party Projects
We extend our deepest gratitude to the following projects and their developers:
- [Winlator](https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator) (Original Repository)
- [moze30/Winlator-Zmod](https://github.com/moze30/winlator-zmod) (Intermediate Structured Fork)
- [Termux Pacman](https://github.com/termux-pacman/glibc-packages) (GLIBC Patches)
- [Wine](https://www.winehq.org/)
- [Box86/Box64](https://github.com/ptitSeb) (by ptitseb)
- [Mesa (Turnip/Zink/VirGL)](https://www.mesa3d.org)
- [DXVK](https://github.com/doitsujin/dxvk)
- [VKD3D](https://gitlab.winehq.org/wine/vkd3d)
- [CNC DDraw](https://github.com/FunkyFr3sh/cnc-ddraw)

Special thanks to ALL developers whose work has made this project possible. Respect and appreciation to every contributor in the open-source ecosystem.

---

## Submitting Code

We welcome everyone to contribute to winlator-zmod! If you'd like your code to be considered for merging, please take a moment to review our requirements:

* Your contributions must be your own original work or modifications, and you must agree to the terms of our [Contributor License Agreement](ContributorLicenseAgreement.md).
* Please try to follow the existing code style and naming conventions used throughout the project.
* Aim to write "clean code" — avoid overly long functions and classes. When adding new features, consider creating new classes instead of adding large amounts of code to existing ones.
* Except for minor bug fixes, submitted code will generally be reviewed, and feedback may be provided. Before merging into the main branch, some adjustments may be requested based on the review.
* Please submit your changes via GitHub's Pull Request feature.

## Help with Translations (Localization)

winlator-zmod supports multiple languages so that users can interact with it in their preferred language — provided translations are available.

If you'd like to help with translations, you can start by checking the [translation requests](https://github.com/ZUXTUO/winlator-zmod/issues) here.

Contributing translations is straightforward: just submit a Pull Request modifying the relevant language resource files in the project.

## Reporting Issues or Suggestions

If you've found a bug or have an idea for improvement, feel free to open an issue!

Before submitting, we recommend searching through [previous issues](https://github.com/ZUXTUO/winlator-zmod/issues?q=is%3Aissue) to see if it has already been reported or resolved.

When reporting a bug, please include log files — they help us diagnose problems much faster. You can obtain logs using Android Studio's Logcat or the ADB tool, which provide detailed information about the app's behavior.

If you're unsure how to do this, just let us know in the issue, and we'll be happy to help.

<br>
<br>

## 项目背景与权属说明

**Winlator-Zmod** 是基于 [moze30](https://github.com/moze30/winlator-zmod) 工作成果的修改版本（Fork），moze30 对 [brunodev85 (Bruno)](https://github.com/brunodev85) 创建的原项目 [Winlator](https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator) 进行了整理。

*   **原始作者：** [brunodev85 (Bruno)](https://github.com/brunodev85)
*   **中间贡献者/整理者：** [moze30](https://github.com/moze30/winlator-zmod)
*   **本分支维护者：** 本仓库仅作为进一步修改和社区维护的版本。**本人并非 Winlator 的原始作者**；本人致力于在 moze30 整理的基础上进行 Fork、修改和维护。

### 鸣谢与第三方项目
我们向以下项目及其开发者致以最深切的谢意：
- [Winlator](https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator) (原始仓库)
- [moze30/Winlator-Zmod](https://github.com/moze30/winlator-zmod) (中间层结构化分支)
- [Termux Pacman](https://github.com/termux-pacman/glibc-packages) (GLIBC 补丁)
- [Wine](https://www.winehq.org/)
- [Box86/Box64](https://github.com/ptitSeb) (by ptitseb)
- [Mesa (Turnip/Zink/VirGL)](https://www.mesa3d.org)
- [DXVK](https://github.com/doitsujin/dxvk)
- [VKD3D](https://gitlab.winehq.org/wine/vkd3d)
- [CNC DDraw](https://github.com/FunkyFr3sh/cnc-ddraw)

特别鸣谢所有使本项目成为可能的开发者。对开源生态系统中的每一位贡献员表示尊重和感谢。

---

## 提交代码

欢迎每个人为 winlator-zmod 做出贡献！如果您希望您的代码被考虑合并，请花一点时间阅读我们的要求：

* 您的贡献必须是您自己的原创作品或修改，并且您必须同意我们的 [贡献者许可协议](ContributorLicenseAgreement.md) 条款。
* 请尽量遵循项目中现有的代码风格和命名约定。
* 目标是编写“简洁的代码”——避免函数和类过于冗长。添加新功能时，请考虑创建新类，而不是向现有类添加大量代码。
* 除细微的错误修复外，提交的代码通常会经过审查并提供反馈。在合并到主分支之前，可能会根据审查结果要求进行一些调整。
* 请通过 GitHub 的 Pull Request 功能提交您的更改。

## 协助翻译（本地化）

winlator-zmod 支持多种语言，以便用户可以使用他们偏好的语言进行交互——前提是已有相应翻译。

如果您想协助翻译，可以从查看此处的 [翻译请求](https://github.com/ZUXTUO/winlator-zmod/issues) 开始。

贡献翻译非常简单：只需提交一个 Pull Request，修改项目中相关的语言资源文件即可。

## 报告问题或建议

如果您发现了错误或有改进建议，请随时开一个 issue！

在提交之前，我们建议搜索 [之前的 issue](https://github.com/ZUXTUO/winlator-zmod/issues?q=is%3Aissue) 以查看是否已报告或解决。

报告错误时，请附上日志文件——这能帮助我们更快地诊断问题。您可以使用 Android Studio 的 Logcat 或 ADB 工具获取日志，它们提供了关于应用行为的详细信息。

如果您不确定如何操作，请在 issue 中告知我们，我们很乐意提供帮助。
